bird.name: Virginia rail
bird.summary: The Virginia rail (Rallus limicola) is a small waterbird, of the family Rallidae. These birds remain fairly common despite continuing loss…

relations.subject: Virginia rail
relations.evidence: The Virginia rail lives in freshwater and brackish marshes, sometimes salt marshes in winter
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: Virginia rail
relations.evidence: Its breeding habitat is marshes from Nova Scotia to Southern British Columbia, California and North Carolina, and in Central America
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
